interfaces.name: OriginChannelMap
interfaces.description:
Open-ended channel registry. Each plugin extends this via declaration merging
in its own `channels.d.ts` — no central file needed.

properties.name: com.origin.app:theme-changed
properties.description: Fired whenever the system theme switches.

interfaces.name: PluginBus
interfaces.description: Pub/sub bus injected into every plugin via PluginContext.

methods.name: publish
methods.description: Broadcast a value on a channel. Cached as the last value.

methods.name: read
methods.description: Synchronously read the last published value on a channel.

methods.name: subscribe
methods.description: Subscribe to a channel. Returns an unsubscribe function.

interfaces.name: PluginContext
interfaces.description: Runtime context injected by PluginHost into every plugin component

properties.name: bus
properties.description: Inter-plugin communication bus scoped to this workspace

properties.name: cardId
properties.description: Unique ID of the card this instance is mounted in

properties.name: workspacePath
properties.description: Absolute path to the workspace root directory (for file I/O)

methods.name: on
methods.description:
Subscribe to a panel lifecycle event.
Returns an unsubscribe function — call it in your plugin's cleanup.

interfaces.name: PluginManifest
interfaces.description: Metadata declared by every plugin. Shown in the Launcher UI.

properties.name: icon
properties.description: Emoji or relative image path shown in the Launcher grid

properties.name: name
properties.description: Human-readable name shown in the Launcher

properties.name: requiredCapabilities
properties.description:
Tauri capabilities this plugin uses. Declarative only in v0.x — displayed
in the plugin install UI so users can see what a plugin claims to need.
Enforced by the capability broker at marketplace launch (v1.0).

typeAliases.name: PluginLifecycleEvent
typeAliases.description: Panel lifecycle event names emitted by PluginHost.

functions.name: useBusChannel
functions.signature: useBusChannel<K extends "com.origin.app:theme-changed">(bus: PluginBus, channel: K): undefined | unknown
functions.description:
Reactively subscribe to a typed bus channel. Re-renders whenever a new value
is published. Returns `undefined` before the first publish.

Channel names are constrained to `keyof OriginChannelMap` — misspelled
channel names are compile errors. Plugins extend `OriginChannelMap` via
declaration merging in their own `channels.d.ts`.
